title: PR/merge flow should be a Robin skill, not Alfred work
description: Every session burns 30%+ of Alfred tokens on the same PR check/fix/push/wait/merge cycle. This is mechanical local work that Robin can and should own via a skill.
fix: Create a Robin skill: git-ci-fix-and-merge. Robin runs ruff locally, fixes lint, pushes, monitors CI, merges when green. Alfred only intervenes for design decisions.
